description: 10-book staged-reduction RAG — TartaurusLoop spec for AJA tutorial

stages.name: Route — pick books
stages.description: Select books from library_dictionary.json relevant to the query.

stages.name: Probe — hybrid search per book
stages.description: Run keyword/semantic probe per selected book; keep top passages.

stages.name: Gap — per-book missing angles
stages.description: For each book, fetch targeted passages for uncovered query topics.

stages.name: Synthesize — cited briefing
stages.description: Merge passages into a concise cited briefing for the agent.
